name: score-flow
description: Score (inference) request through MWC and ACA inference container — happy path.

steps.title: Caller sends score POST
steps.action: Caller (Fabric Portal Test endpoint / REST / notebook SDK) sends POST .../mlmodels/<artifactId>/endpoint/versions/<version>/score with the JSON / DataFrame payload in the body. The x-ms-parent-activity-id header is the correlation key into backend traces.

steps.title: MWC score controller receives request
steps.action: Confirms the request reached the MWC API and routes it to ScoreVersionAsync on the manager.

logAnchor.marker: Checking for moniker eviction for moniker Id

steps.title: Read endpoint metadata (Redis → Cosmos fallback)
steps.action: Reads endpoint metadata: tries the Redis cache first, falls back to Cosmos central store. Throws EndpointNotFound if neither has a record for the artifact.

steps.title: Resolve requested version
steps.action: Resolves the request version string against the metadata's known versions. If the resolver returns empty, short-circuits with 404 NotFound "Version {version} not found" and emits a Failed model-monitoring event.

steps.title: Version-state precondition
steps.action: Asserts versionState in (Running, Updating, UpdateFailed) AND envState == Running. If either side is false the flow short-circuits to the Initializing branch (V1) or returns 409 Conflict (V2).

steps.title: Scale-down probe (Redis)
steps.action: Queries Redis for the version's current ACA replica count to decide whether to wrap the forward call in a cold-start cancellation timeout. Both branches end up calling ForwardScoreRequestAsync; only the cancellation token differs.

steps.title: Forward score request to ACA container
steps.action: Builds the ACA managed-environment URL, fetches an MSI token for the app audience, and POSTs the streamed payload to the ACA inference container. Throws TaskCanceledException on cold-start timeout or HTTP error from the container.

logAnchor.marker: Executed Container app API: response code

steps.title: NGINX ingress accepts POST
steps.action: Request lands on the endpoint-ingress container's NGINX on port 8080. NGINX matches a per-version location block; if none exists yet, the default returns 503 "Version Unavailable/Not setup yet". Upstream failures map to 502/504.

steps.title: JWT auth subrequest
steps.action: NGINX's auth_request /auth issues an internal subrequest to the colocated Gunicorn sidecar; bearer JWT is decoded with RS256 against the tenant JWKS, then the oid claim is checked against ML_WORKLOAD_PRINCIPAL_ID allowlist. Returns 401 on invalid token, 403 on non-allowlisted principal.

steps.title: Score handler entry
steps.action: NGINX proxy_passes to the per-version model-runner Container App; Gunicorn dispatches the POST to the Flask score blueprint. Parses the body as JSON and Pydantic-validates it as ModelRunnerRequestPayload; returns 400 InvalidInput on JsonDecodeError or ValidationError.

steps.title: Load model (cold-start path)
steps.action: Returns the in-process cached MLflow PredictUtils if already loaded; otherwise fetches model metadata via mlflow.models.get_model_info and constructs a fresh PredictUtils under a double-checked lock. On error: clears the cache and raises RuntimeError, which score_handler converts to a 500.

steps.title: Format branch + tensor-flight gate
steps.action: Branches on payload formatType. The dataframe branch parses inputs as a DataFrame; the tensor branch is gated by is_tensor_support_enabled() which reads the MODELENDPOINT_TENSOR_SUPPORT env var set by the workload's tensor-support feature flight. If the flight is OFF, returns 400 UnsupportedItemType.

steps.title: MLflow predict()
steps.action: Invokes the underlying ML framework's predict() — TensorFlow / PyTorch / scikit-learn / XGBoost etc., depending on the model flavor MLflow detected at load time. MlflowException / ValueError / AttributeError / NotImplementedError map to 400 via typed exception handlers; any other exception becomes a 500 GenericExceptionError.

logAnchor.marker: Returning model prediction output back to caller

steps.title: Emit certified InvokeModelEndpointVersion event
steps.action: After the ACA forward returns, derives ActivityStatus from the response (Succeeded if 200 OK, else Failed) and always emits the certified event for the InvokeModelEndpointVersion audit activity — the durable record that a score attempt happened.

steps.title: Fire-and-forget update of last-score-time
steps.action: Only when IsSuccessStatusCode is true. Spawns a Task.Run (fire-and-forget via DoNotWait) that updates the Cosmos lastScoreTime field for the endpoint. Failures here do not block the response; the value is consumed downstream by auto-sleep / scale-down decisions.

steps.title: Emit Score / Succeeded model-monitoring event
steps.action: Emits a model-monitoring telemetry event with ActivityStatus.Succeeded, the Score operation name, response status code, version number, default-version flag, input row count, and model flavor. Drives operational dashboards. Failure branch emits the same event with ActivityStatus.Failed.

steps.title: Return scored response to caller
steps.action: Returns the HttpResponseMessage carrying the ACA container's prediction payload back through ScoreVersionAsync → controller → client. Synchronous request ends here — no LRO polling, no background work.
